title: Treat RWS identity as a named deck lineage rather than universal Tarot

positions.summary: Use the Rider–Waite–Smith 78-card identity and ordering with explicit source attribution.
Marseille, Thoth, and other decks require separate card identity, imagery, ordering, and interpretation rules.

default_policy.rationale: The shipped deck and rules are explicitly RWS-based and must not silently generalize to other Tarot traditions.

user_disclosure: This engine uses the RWS lineage. Other Tarot decks and traditions need independent rule and source packs.
